history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person stands in front of a black metal gate, with a house and lush greenery in the background. They are wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "WORLD CLUB UNIVERSE" and features a graphic of a star with a silhouette inside. A leopard print bandana is tied around their neck, peeking out from under the t-shirt collar. On their head, they wear a pink and white trucker hat with a circular emblem on the front. Their lower half is clad in oversized, light grey sweatpants, and they are wearing black and white sneakers. The ground is paved with dark, rectangular bricks, some of which are covered in moss. The lighting suggests it's daytime, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and streetwear-inspired. The color palette is dominated by the black and white of the clothing, the grey of the sweatpants, the pink of the hat, and the natural greens and browns of the background.
